paragraphs: Achieve the warm glow and heat of a traditional fireplace without the need for a chimney or a gas line. Our electric fireplaces are easy to install and create a cozy, warm ambiance in any room. Explore this page for electric fireplace ideas and inspiration.

When shopping for an electric fireplace, there are several key factors to ensure that you find the perfect fit for your home. In this article, we'll explore the essential features and considerations to help you make an informed decision.
Electric fireplaces are generally an inexpensive way to add character to your home.
Electric fireplaces don’t require ventilation or a chimney making it an easy design solution you can DIY.
Today’s electric fireplaces have more realistic, captivating flames and come in a variety of types and sizes that can emit varying levels of heat depending on your space.
Read more about electric fireplaces to help you make an informed decision.
Get inspired with this DIY install of our most realistic electric fireplace by architect Christine Nickerson.
Transform your bedroom with the Allusion Platinum electric fireplace and Boyd Buildout Kit. Create a cozy, stylish focal point that’s easy to install and perfect for any season.
Transform your fireplace into a festive centerpiece this holiday season with decorating ideas for Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Year’s.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.
